race.comment: SHYAMALAN (3) creates plenty of interest here on the back of a narrow defeat in Highway company at Hawkesbury 15 days ago. He was racing well prior to that with big weights for a 3YO against the older horses. Drawn ideally here to be on the speed and he'll take plenty of catching out to the mile for the first time. BUENOS (1) finished off strongly from the back first-up during the Wagga carnival and jumps straight out to the mile second-up. She's likely to be spotting them a start, though she's a mare on the way up and the fresh run showed she was back in good order. Can feature in the finish. JUST SHANE (2) is better than he's shown his past couple and finds a suitable race here coming back to Country level. Has the speed to offset the tricky draw and can give a bold sight. SWEET TREATS (6) can sit closer today out in trip and won't be far away. BRANNUM (5) can bounce back to form dropping in distance and back to country level.
